system.benefit: Always awake for Awareness Tests and surprise
system.description: The slightest change in conditions or disturbance brings the character from sleep to full awareness, remaining alert even in slumber. The character is always assumed to be awake, even when asleep, for the purposes of Awareness Tests or surprise. Unfortunately, the character's sleep is not deep and can be frequently interrupted, resulting in a less-than-cheery disposition when awake.
